full_text:
Li Le 李樂
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Le (李樂)was born in Xihe. Bandit who helped Emperor Xian escape Li Jue’s grasp and found the boats to cross a river. Li Le was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
